name: gemma4_e4b_aesthetic3_teacher_v1
description: Three-model aesthetic-only teacher for Gemma 4 E4B. This pass uses exactly NIMA unit, RGNet, and A-Lamp. The weights are the conservative four-model aesthetic ensemble rebased after removing AADB composition: RGNet 0.35/0.70, A-Lamp 0.20/0.70, NIMA 0.15/0.70.
